body:
# Stefan Torges

**Role:** Head of Strategic Initiatives

[Stefan Torges](https://www.linkedin.com/in/stefan-torges-9b8b537a) was previously Head of Fellowship at [Non-Trivial](https://non-trivial.org/) and Managing Director at [Macroscopic Ventures](https://macroscopic.org/), where he oversaw the deployment of over $20M in AI safety grants. He has scaled multiple research fellowship programs, including launching the [Center on Long-Term Risk](https://longtermrisk.org/)'s fellowship program.
